features.title: OTP Platform
features.desc: Send WhatsApp OTP messages to your users with a single API call.

campaigns.title: Bulk Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Create and manage your WhatsApp marketing campaigns
campaigns.csv_help: CSV must have a 'phone' column (with country code, no +).

templates.title: Message Templates
templates.subtitle: Create reusable templates for campaigns and automated messages
templates.name: Template Name
templates.no_templates: No templates found. Create your first template to get started!
templates.hint: Use double curly braces for variables, e.g., {{variable_name}}.

send_message.title: Send Message
send_message.subtitle: Test sending messages directly from your dashboard.
send_message.message_placeholder: Hello, this is a custom message...
send_message.caption: Caption (Optional)
send_message.api_hint: Paste an active API key to authorize the request.
send_message.info_text: This tool uses your own API to send messages. When you click send, the dashboard makes a request to:
send_message.tip_1: Ensure your WhatsApp is connected (Check the WhatsApp tab).
send_message.tip_2: Text and Template messages are delivered instantly.
send_message.tip_3: Media messages (images and PDFs) are securely uploaded and sent.
send_message.tip_4: All messages count towards your monthly limit.
